info.title: Plugin Gateway API
info.description: First-party internal API for BC-02 Plugin Gateway REST proxying, webhook dispatch, and MCP routing for plugin tools.
info.summary: Internal plugin and MCP gateway API

post.summary: Proxy MCP JSON-RPC call to plugin backend
post.description: Routes a JSON-RPC 2.0 MCP request to the plugin pod identified by slug. Injects X-Tenant-Id, X-Request-Id, X-Correlation-Id headers.

200.description: MCP response proxied from plugin backend

X-Response-Id.description: Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.
Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.

502.description: Plugin pod unreachable or returned error

X-Response-Id.description: Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.

post.description: Forwards CloudEvents 1.0 payload from core BC to the target plugin pod. Dispatch is async (returns 202 immediately). Retries with exponential backoff.

X-Response-Id.description: Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.
Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.
Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.

get.summary: Proxy REST request to target BC service
get.description: Resolves the target BC from the URL path and proxies the request with circuit breaker protection. Strips /api/bc-02/gateway/v1 prefix.

X-Response-Id.description: Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.

404.description: Route not configured for the target BC

X-Response-Id.description: Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.
Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.

503.description: Circuit breaker open — target BC unavailable

X-Response-Id.description: Technical response identifier equal to the inbound X-Request-Id.
